context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct ElevenLabs React SDK packages, wraps components in ConversationProvider, prefers granular hooks over the all-in-one hook, places error handling at the provider level, and registers client tools with useConversationClientTool.

checklist.name: Correct React package
checklist.description: Imports from @elevenlabs/react (not @elevenlabs/client or the deprecated elevenlabs package) for React-specific hooks and provider

checklist.name: No deprecated package
checklist.description: Does NOT import from or install the deprecated elevenlabs npm package (v1.x) anywhere in the code

checklist.name: Server-side SDK package
checklist.description: Agent creation/management code imports ElevenLabsClient from @elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js (not from elevenlabs or other packages)

checklist.name: ConversationProvider wrapping
checklist.description: Hook-consuming components are wrapped in ConversationProvider somewhere in the component tree

checklist.name: Granular hooks used
checklist.description: Uses at least one of useConversationControls or useConversationStatus (not only useConversation as the sole session management hook)

checklist.name: onError at provider level
checklist.description: onError callback is passed as a prop to ConversationProvider rather than to an individual hook or the startSession call

checklist.name: Client tool registration hook
checklist.description: Uses useConversationClientTool to register client tool handlers inside a component (not via clientTools in startSession when using the React SDK)

checklist.name: Agent enableVersioning
checklist.description: Agent creation call includes enableVersioning: true (JS) or enable_versioning=True (Python)

checklist.name: Client tool in server config
checklist.description: The agent's server-side configuration includes the client tool definitions in the tools array under conversation_config.agent.prompt
